shots.title: 河边远景开场
shots.prompt: cinematic wide shot, two people standing by a calm riverside at sunset, soft golden light, willow trees, gentle breeze, natural color grading, high detail
shots.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, extra arms, deformed face, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: subtle camera push-in, leaves and water move naturally, two characters talking casually

shots.title: 双人中景对话
shots.prompt: medium two-shot, two young adults talking near river, one gestures with hand, relaxed expressions, realistic cinematic style, soft backlight
shots.negative_prompt: cartoon style, overexposed, noisy image, extra fingers
shots.video_prompt: small body movement and hand gesture while speaking, stable framing

shots.title: A肩后看B
shots.prompt: over-shoulder shot from character A to character B, river in background, B speaking with slight smile, cinematic depth of field
shots.video_prompt: B lip movement and slight head nod, background water ripple

shots.title: 近景收尾
shots.prompt: close-up two characters by riverside smiling, warm light, emotional ending, cinematic portrait composition
shots.video_prompt: slight smile and eye movement, soft ending hold
